### example in KLEE (1) {.smaller}

```c
...
int main() {
    int a, b;
    klee_make_symbolic(&a, sizeof(a), "a");
    klee_make_symbolic(&b, sizeof(a), "b");
    foo(a, b);
}
```
<hr>
```
$ klee example1.bc
KLEE: output directory is "/home/klee/klee-out-1"
KLEE: Using STP solver backend
KLEE: SAT solver: MiniSat
KLEE: ERROR: ./example1.c:16: ASSERTION FAIL: a + b != 5
KLEE: NOTE: now ignoring this error at this location

KLEE: done: total instructions = 74
KLEE: done: completed paths = 4
KLEE: done: partially completed paths = 4
KLEE: done: generated tests = 5
```

### example in KLEE (2) {.smaller}

*  produces 5 tests:
   *  a=0,b=5
   *  a=0,b=0x7fffffff
   *  a=0,b=0
   *  a=0x01010101,b=0x80000001
   *  a=0x01010101,b=0
<hr>
```
void foo(int a, int b) {
  /* (0) */
  if (a != 0) {
    b -= 2;
    a += b;
  }
  /* (1) */
  if (b < 5) {
    b += 4;
  }
  /* (2) */
  assert(a + b != 5);
}
```
